name: Training Cluster Reset Checklist
summary: Prepare and review HPC training environments before and after workshops.
description: This skill helps instructors and HPC support teams run read-only preflight checks and follow a human-reviewed reset checklist for workshops, courses, and training clusters without embedding private site policy or destructive cleanup commands.

inputs.name: workshop_id
inputs.description: Public workshop, course, or event identifier to include in report names.

inputs.name: partition
inputs.description: Optional training or debug partition to inspect.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Directory where the preflight report should be written.

outputs.name: training_preflight_report
outputs.description: A local directory containing read-only queue, partition, module, and filesystem snapshots for a training event.

outputs.name: reset_checklist
outputs.description: A human-reviewed checklist for preparing, running, and closing a training environment.

examples.title: Collect a read-only training preflight report

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example references.
Check shell syntax without contacting a scheduler.
Run the preflight script before a workshop and confirm any cleanup actions remain human-reviewed and site-approved.
